title: Google Gemini AI Launch Delayed According to Reports
description: Recent reports indicate delays for Google's Gemini AI. Bloomberg.com cites internal goal shortfalls, while 9to5Google notes coding performance issues affecting the 3.5 Pro model.

sources.title: Google Gemini Launch Delayed as Tech Falls Short of Internal Goals
Gemini 3.5 Pro delays due to coding performance, upgraded Flash model in testing
The Bull Case For Alphabet (GOOGL) Could Change Following EU AI Rules And Gemini Delay - Learn Why

sections.heading: Launch Postponement
paragraphs: According to Bloomberg.com, the launch of Google Gemini has been delayed because the technology has fallen short of internal goals.

sections.heading: Technical Performance Issues
paragraphs: 9to5Google reports that the delays for the Gemini 3.5 Pro model are specifically due to coding performance. Additionally, the source mentions that an upgraded Flash model is currently in testing.

sections.heading: Market and Regulatory Context
paragraphs: Simply Wall Street suggests that the bull case for Alphabet (GOOGL) could change following EU AI rules and the reported delay of Gemini.

faq.q: Why was the Google Gemini launch delayed?
faq.a: According to Bloomberg.com, the launch was delayed as the technology fell short of internal goals.

faq.q: What specific issues affected the Gemini 3.5 Pro model?
faq.a: 9to5Google reports that the delays for this model were due to coding performance.

faq.q: Is there a new model being tested?
faq.a: Yes, 9to5Google states that an upgraded Flash model is currently in testing.
